channel.title: iDigital
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from iDigital, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Reliable Robotics raises funding for fully automated aircraft
item.description: $160 million round supports development and FAA certification for autonomy system.

item.title: End of an era: Honeywell hands warehouse automation to AIP
item.description: Honeywell to sell Intelligrated and Transnorm brands to American Industrial Partners.

item.title: Will fusion power get cheap? Don't count on it, study says
item.description: Fusion offers zero-emissions electricity, but costs may remain high.

item.title: The Download: introducing the Nature issue
item.description: Weekday newsletter provides daily dose of technology news.

item.title: Pudu Robotics raises nearly $150M to target industrial applications
item.description: Funding to develop embodied AI and expand global markets beyond service robots.

item.title: A&K Robotics lands $8M for autonomous mobility
item.description: Investment led by BDC and Vantage Futures to expand production and R&D.

item.title: The Download: introducing the 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now
item.description: Weekday newsletter provides daily dose of technology news.

item.title: From EVs to robotics: Tesla targets 10M Optimus units with new Texas plant
item.description: Production begins Q2 2026, replacing Fremont car lines as Tesla scales robotics.

item.title: 3 things Michelle Kim is into right now
item.description: Virtual idols and more from the tech enthusiast.

item.title: AI needs a strong data fabric to deliver business value
item.description: Organizations deploy copilots, agents, and platforms to scale AI.

item.title: Railway secures $100M to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
item.description: San Francisco platform amassed two million developers without marketing spend.

item.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does same thing for free.
item.description: AI coding revolution comes with a catch: it's expensive.

item.title: Listen Labs raises $69M after viral billboard hiring stunt
item.description: Startup needed to hire over 100 engineers, competing with Zuckerberg's $100M offer.

item.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent to battle Microsoft and Google
item.description: Rebuilt Slackbot transforms from notification tool to workplace assistant.

item.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files
item.description: No coding required; extends power of Claude Code to non-technical users.

item.title: Advance trustworthy AI and ML, identify best practices for scaling AI
item.description: Department of Energy prioritizes mitigating agency risk in AI.

item.title: Promise and perils of using AI for hiring: guard against data bias
item.description: AI widely used for screening candidates but poses risk of bias.

item.title: Best practices for building AI development platform in government
item.description: CMU's AI stack fundamental to US Army's approach.

item.title: Novelty in the game of Go provides insights for AI and autonomous vehicles
item.description: Humans exhibit flashes of brilliance; AI can learn from them.

item.title: Predictive maintenance proving out as successful AI use case
item.description: Companies exploit AI and IoT sensors to collect maintenance data.
